## Problem
Users spend too much time manually triaging ideas before shaping.
They need a structured triage system that captures context early.

## Solution
A triage prompt system that asks 3-5 structured questions per idea,
captures the answers in an inbox, and feeds structured data to the
Shape Up stage.

## Scope

### IN
- Triage question templates
- Inbox storage for deferred ideas
- Structured output to Shape Up

### OUT
- Voting/ranking system
- Multi-user collaboration
- External integrations

## Risks
- Users may find structured triage too rigid for early-stage ideas
- Risk of analysis paralysis during triage
